caribbean.headline: Heavy Rainfall Hits St Lucia with Moderate Winds and Seas
caribbean.paragraph: St. Lucia is experiencing heavy rainfall with a 96% rain probability accompanied by moderate easterly winds at 11 kt and wave heights reaching 5.2 ft with a 7-second swell period from the ESE. Turks & Caicos sees stronger winds up to 20 kt but lower rain chances, making St. Lucia the primary concern for today's weather impact in the Caribbean.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Dubrovnik Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing heavy rain with 100% rain probability accompanied by moderate southerly winds reaching 17 knots and wave heights up to 5.2 feet. Naples has lighter conditions with winds up to 15 knots and less than 10% rain probability, making Dubrovnik the primary weather concern in the Central Mediterranean.
